source: GICS sector SPDRs (State Street), major index ETFs, and hand-built thematic constituent baskets (Mag 7, semis, memory, software, AI-infra, banks, homebuilders, nuclear/power). Constituents are approximate and US-listed only; verify current membership with the issuer/index. All analytics are computed from LIVE fetched daily price history, not from anything stored here.
note: Three entry TYPES. (1) type:'sector' or type:'index' → a single-ticker ETF proxy (only 'ticker' is required). (2) type:'group' → a synthetic EQUAL-WEIGHT, daily-rebalanced basket built from 'members' (US-listed tickers); this also unlocks the breadth panel (% of members above their 50/200-day average, advancers/decliners). Add or remove an entry by editing entries[]. 'on':true default-includes it. This file is fetched at load; if unreachable the tool falls back to an inline copy. Fewer default-on entries = a faster first fetch (Twelve Data free tier is throttled).

entries.label: Technology
entries.desc: Technology Select Sector SPDR — hardware, semiconductors and software megacaps (AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, AVGO).

entries.label: Communication Svcs
entries.desc: Communication Services Select Sector SPDR — GOOGL, META, NFLX, telecom and media.

entries.label: Consumer Discret.
entries.desc: Consumer Discretionary Select Sector SPDR — AMZN, TSLA, HD, retail, autos, travel.

entries.label: Consumer Staples
entries.desc: Consumer Staples Select Sector SPDR — defensives: PG, COST, KO, WMT. Classic late-cycle / risk-off leader.

entries.label: Energy
entries.desc: Energy Select Sector SPDR — XOM, CVX, oil & gas. Commodity/inflation-sensitive rotation vehicle.

entries.label: Financials
entries.desc: Financial Select Sector SPDR — banks, insurers, payments (JPM, BRK.B, V, MA). Rate- and curve-sensitive.

entries.label: Health Care
entries.desc: Health Care Select Sector SPDR — LLY, UNH, JNJ, pharma/biotech/devices. Defensive tilt.

entries.label: Industrials
entries.desc: Industrial Select Sector SPDR — GE, CAT, aerospace, machinery, rails. Early-cycle / reflation proxy.

entries.label: Materials
entries.desc: Materials Select Sector SPDR — LIN, chemicals, metals, mining. Commodity-cycle sensitive.

entries.label: Real Estate
entries.desc: Real Estate Select Sector SPDR — REITs. Highly rate-sensitive.

entries.label: Utilities
entries.desc: Utility Select Sector SPDR — defensives + the AI-power-demand theme (CEG, VST, NEE). Bond-proxy.

entries.label: Nasdaq 100
entries.desc: Invesco QQQ — Nasdaq-100 large-cap growth/tech. Growth-vs-value rotation gauge.

entries.label: Russell 2000
entries.desc: iShares Russell 2000 — small caps. Risk-appetite / breadth barometer vs large caps.

entries.label: S&P 500 Equal Wt
entries.desc: Invesco S&P 500 Equal Weight — RSP vs SPY reveals megacap concentration vs broad participation.

entries.label: Dow 30
entries.desc: SPDR Dow Jones Industrial Average — price-weighted blue chips; value/cyclical lean.

entries.label: S&P MidCap 400
entries.desc: SPDR S&P MidCap 400 — the mid-cap slice; useful in the size-rotation read.

entries.label: Magnificent 7
entries.desc: The seven megacaps that dominate index returns. Equal-weight basket — breadth panel shows how many of the 7 are still individually in uptrends.

entries.label: Semiconductors
entries.desc: Broad semiconductor complex — logic, equipment and analog. The cyclical heartbeat of the tech tape.

entries.label: Memory & Storage
entries.desc: US-listed DRAM/NAND & storage names (Samsung/SK Hynix are not US-listed). Highly cyclical pricing; leads/lags the broader semis.

entries.label: Software
entries.desc: Application & infrastructure software incl. security and data. Higher-duration growth; rate-sensitive.

entries.label: AI Datacenter/Infra
entries.desc: AI buildout picks-and-shovels — accelerators, networking, servers, power & cooling. Overlaps semis but adds power/electrical.

entries.label: Big Banks
entries.desc: Money-center + investment banks. Yield-curve and credit-cycle sensitive; a cyclical-rotation tell.

entries.label: Homebuilders
entries.desc: Homebuilders — rate-sensitive early-cycle group that often leads at rate-cycle turns.

entries.label: Nuclear & Power
entries.desc: Power generation + nuclear/uranium riding AI datacenter electricity demand. Newer names (SMR, OKLO) have short history — the basket handles that gracefully.

entries.label: Bitcoin
entries.desc: Bitcoin (USD). Provider symbols differ (Yahoo BTC-USD, Twelve Data BTC/USD) — resolved automatically. Trades 7 days/week; correlation uses only overlapping weekdays. Watch its correlation to software/growth and to gold.

entries.label: Ethereum
entries.desc: Ethereum (USD). Same provider-symbol handling as BTC.

entries.label: Gold
entries.desc: SPDR Gold Shares — the classic risk-off / real-rates hedge. Gold-vs-BTC and gold-vs-equities correlation is a core rotation tell.

entries.label: Silver
entries.desc: iShares Silver Trust — higher-beta precious metal; industrial + monetary demand.

entries.label: Long Treasuries
entries.desc: iShares 20+ Year Treasury — long-duration bonds. Its correlation to equities flips sign across regimes (a key macro signal).

entries.label: High-Yield Credit
entries.desc: iShares iBoxx High Yield Corporate — credit risk appetite; leads equity stress.

entries.label: Crude Oil
entries.desc: United States Oil Fund — crude proxy; drives Energy-sector relative strength and inflation expectations.

entries.label: US Dollar
entries.desc: Invesco DB US Dollar Bullish — the dollar. A stronger dollar pressures commodities, gold, EM and large-cap multinationals.
